BloodMagic.DropHint: Drop spells from this character sheet here
BloodMagic.OnlySpellsWarning: Only spells can be dropped into this zone!
BloodMagic.SameActorWarning: The spell must be from this same character sheet!

Messages.Ready: The action will watch this regeneration rule's "Deactivated by" list and apply a temporary no-regeneration effect when matching damage is received.
Messages.MissingRule: No regeneration rule element was found on this action. Add a regeneration rule first.
Messages.MissingTriggers: Regeneration automation is enabled, but the regeneration rule has no "Deactivated by" entries yet.

BlockEffect.Name: Regeneration Disabled
BlockEffect.Description: This creature's regeneration is disabled until the end of its next turn.

CreatureAttack.Hint: Configure one creature strike from this action. Quality values are recalculated from the creature level table.
CreatureAttack.EmptyEffectsHint: Selected attack effects will appear here.
CreatureAttack.DropEffectHint: Drop a custom attack effect here.

DamageAdjustments.Hint: Choose the adjustment type, add the needed damage types from the list below, and set either a flat value or a level-based formula.

Enhancement.EditorHint: HTML tags and entities are supported. The buttons insert common snippets.

ActorLanguages.Hint: Selected languages are shown on this actor sheet while the action is on the actor.

ActorSenses.Hint: Selected senses are shown on this actor sheet while the action is on the actor.
